flags: E kernel bias — impact 2 (26.2% win share)

races.analysis: Built brings the field's ceiling — a 112 in the Carter and a 107 Gulfstream sprint line — plus a presser profile in a 6f setup where E/P types carry a 1.71 impact, and the engine makes him a ~27% favorite in a deep Vanderbilt. Damon's Mound (105 best, sharp early speed in an E-biased kernel) and Cat On Time's model-fig consistency make the top three a genuine three-deep exacta spread.

races.analysis: Always a Runner has won 3 of 4 with the division's steadiest fig line (88-94-99-95) and the engine gives her ~32% in a CCA Oaks where stalkers fit the 9f kernel's E/P tilt. Directive's Mother Goose-beating 95 and Counting Stars' Acorn 101 are the class checks — the engine ranks them clear of Kentucky Oaks winner Dandona, whose best 2026 figs came over softer early paces. [Note: #9 Nycon also entered Fri R3 at 1m.]
